title: Dataset of live imaging of RNA Polymerase II CTD phosphorylation in zebrafish embryos
author: Hamideh Hajiabadi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Images are recruited RNA polymerase II Serine 5 (Pol II Ser5P) and RNA polymerase II Serine 2 (Pol II Ser2P) in live sphere stage zebrafish embryos, visualized with antibody fragments (Fab) labelled with Janelia Fluor 647 and Alexa Fluor 488, respectively. 
 
Dataset " EmbryoC_20ms_040.nd2"  is recorded by 20 ms exposure time and contains 120 frames.  Dataset " EmbryoC_50ms_042.nd2 " contains images recorded with 50 ms exposure time and contains 61 frames.
steps_raw:
